articles.title: 阶跃入局，重构智能体时代操作系统
“不听劝”的印奇，为什么坚持做智能体手机？ ｜ 对话阶跃星辰
物理AI，让自动驾驶迎来了“第二春”
Sam Altman didn’t need another lawsuit
Google’s Demis Hassabis says it’s time for a global AI watchdog — led by the US
New York becomes the first state to enact a data center moratorium
New York State halts construction of all new data centers
New York Governor Signs First Statewide Data Center Moratorium
articles.summary: New York Governor Kathy Hochul signed an executive order imposing a one-year moratorium on new data center construction statewide. This marks the first such statewide ban in the US, signaling growing regulatory pushback against AI infrastructure expansion due to energy and environmental concerns.

articles.title: DeepSeek Is Preparing For IPO Filing as Soon as This Year
articles.summary: Chinese AI company DeepSeek has begun preparations for an IPO that could be filed as soon as this year, potentially marking a landmark moment for China's AI industry. A DeepSeek public offering would intensify US-China AI competition and raise questions about Western market access and technology transfer.

articles.title: DeepMind chief Demis Hassabis calls for US-led body to test ‘frontier’ AI models
articles.summary: DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis called for a US-led international body to test frontier AI models, warning that society has a 'precious window' to prepare before AI advances further. The proposal adds a prominent industry voice to debates around global AI governance and safety evaluation frameworks.

articles.title: DeepSeek weighs new fundraising a month after closing first round
articles.summary: DeepSeek is reportedly weighing new fundraising just one month after closing its first funding round, reflecting an unusually rapid pace of capital injection as the Chinese AI startup builds out infrastructure. The swift fundraising cycle signals both intense investor interest and the enormous capital demands of frontier AI development.

articles.title: Nvidia slashes list of authorized customers in Asia in a bid to reduce AI chip smuggling, report claims — company sent field inspectors, called customers to check if business is genuine after pressure from Washington
articles.summary: Nvidia has sharply reduced its list of authorized customers in Asia, cutting more than half of verified clients and deploying field inspectors and phone interviews to combat AI chip smuggling to restricted markets. The crackdown, conducted under pressure from Washington, tightens controls on the flow of advanced AI chips to potentially sanctioned end users.

articles.title: 阿里云：下调GLM-5.2 Fast mode模式价格
智谱：英文名称变更为Z.AI Co., Ltd.
中国机器人，让美国人焦虑了
AI下半场，买“云”不买“芯”？
机器人大脑，值钱的生意还是卖炭的苦活？
Reflection inks $1B compute deal with Nebius
Why the AI Boom Is Making Everything More Expensive
articles.summary: Surging AI demand is driving a historic shortage of memory chips, pushing up costs across the technology sector. This supply constraint threatens to slow AI infrastructure build-out and inflate costs for cloud providers and AI developers.

articles.title: Nebius to Sell $1 Billion in AI Capacity to Reflection
articles.summary: Cloud provider Nebius Group agreed to sell over $1 billion in computing capacity to Reflection AI, a startup founded by two former Google DeepMind researchers. The deal underscores the massive and growing demand for AI compute infrastructure and highlights the talent-to-capital pipeline from major AI labs to startups.

articles.title: 你的AI对象，要被强制“下线”了
AI进入“重工业时代”：万亿算力基建，如何赚钱？
路线分野与终局迷雾：Rokid不想做下一个黑莓
AI融资489亿背后的焦虑：技术领先者，如何跨越心智鸿沟
AI大厂进军医药，但资本市场等不了十年
Jul 14, 2026ProductIntroducing Claude for Teachers
Jul 14, 2026AnnouncementsAnthropic commits $10 million to Canadian AI research
The Download: Claude’s inner workings, and the future of world models
DOGE Used AI for Housing Policy. The Government Won’t Say How
articles.summary: The Department of Housing and Urban Development withheld documents about DOGE's use of AI in housing policy, citing a non-existent legal privilege in response to a public records request. This raises serious concerns about government transparency and accountability in AI-driven policymaking.

articles.title: Software Stocks Sink as IBM Miss Delivers ‘Devastating Blow’
articles.summary: IBM reported preliminary earnings that missed analyst expectations, triggering a sharp sell-off in software and IT services stocks. The miss signals that enterprise customers are redirecting IT budgets toward AI hardware rather than traditional software and services.

articles.title: AI Investment Race Could Turn Debt-Fueled Boom to Bust, BIS Says
articles.summary: The Bank for International Settlements warned that the debt-fueled AI infrastructure investment race is on track to exceed previous tech booms that ended in severe market disruptions. The warning highlights systemic financial risk as companies pour capital into AI data centers and chips amid uncertain returns.

articles.title: Google reportedly ramps up TPU push to court Nvidia-backed cloud providers
articles.summary: Google is reportedly accelerating its push to offer custom TPU-based cloud services to attract providers that currently rely on Nvidia hardware. This move intensifies competition in the AI compute market and could reduce dependence on Nvidia's dominant GPU ecosystem.

articles.title: China claims chip exports nearly doubled to $177 billion in the first half of 2026 as memory prices surged — 96% year-on-year increase inflated by hikes
articles.summary: China reported chip exports nearly doubled to $177 billion in the first half of 2026, a 96% year-on-year increase largely driven by surging memory prices amid global AI hardware demand. While the headline figure is inflated by price hikes rather than volume alone, it signals China's growing role in the global AI chip supply chain.

articles.title: The real AI race may no longer be at the frontier
Spotify expands its AI push with a ChatGPT-like music assistant
PsiQuantum has a plan to make a massive quantum computer out of light
TSMC and Vanguard drive Taiwan's silicon foundry revenue up 54% YoY in June
articles.summary: Taiwan's silicon foundry revenue rose 54% year-on-year in June, driven by TSMC and Vanguard, reflecting surging demand for advanced semiconductor manufacturing. This growth underscores Taiwan's central role in supplying the chips that power AI systems globally.

articles.title: The Chatbot That Foretold Why People Share Secrets With ChatGPT
articles.summary: The 1960s MIT chatbot ELIZA, created by Joseph Weizenbaum, established early patterns of human emotional disclosure to AI systems that foreshadow modern ChatGPT behavior. Understanding this history matters for AI safety and alignment research, particularly around user trust and parasocial relationships with AI.

articles.title: Apple supplier Lingyi iTech bets big on AI with US$590M bid for assets of bankrupt fiber maker Futong
articles.summary: Apple supplier Lingyi iTech has bid $590 million for assets of bankrupt fiber maker Futong as part of a strategic push into AI-related supply chains. The acquisition reflects broader industry consolidation as component manufacturers reposition to capture AI infrastructure demand.

articles.title: How sales teams use ChatGPT Work
How data science teams use ChatGPT Work
QuestMobile六月AI原生App月活榜：豆包3. 8 亿断层第一，千问增速暴涨近 58 倍QuestMobile报告显示，2026年上半年AI原生App月活达4.99亿，同比增长85.4%，扭转被终端AI压制的格局；月人均使用时长183分钟，增40%，迈入日常刚需。第一梯队豆包、千问、DeepSeek格局稳固，马太效应加剧。刚刚16.9K
articles.summary: A QuestMobile report shows China's AI-native app monthly active users reached 499 million in H1 2026, up 85.4% year-on-year, with Doubao leading at 380 million MAU and Qianwen growing nearly 58-fold. The data signals that AI apps are becoming daily necessities in China, with winner-takes-most dynamics intensifying among top platforms.

articles.title: 腾讯混元发布 HyOCR-1.5：仅 1B 参数 推理提速 6.37 倍轻量级端到端OCR模型HyOCR-1.5发布，在保持轻量化同时大幅提升性能与效率。作为首个全栈开源OCR模型，它全面开放权重、训练配方、数据构造方法及推理加速框架，显著降低开发门槛，让开发者可轻松复现、微调，并在消费级显卡或笔记本上部署。刚刚10.6K
articles.summary: Tencent Hunyuan released HyOCR-1.5, a 1B-parameter end-to-end OCR model that achieves 6.37x inference speedup and is fully open-sourced including weights, training recipes, data construction methods, and inference frameworks. The full-stack open release lowers the barrier for developers to deploy capable OCR on consumer hardware, increasing competitive pressure in the document AI space.

articles.title: 视觉模型新突破：商汤开源 SenseNova-Vision-7B-MoT商汤科技开源多任务视觉模型SenseNova-Vision-7B-MoT，集成目标检测、OCR、深度估计、法线估计、图像分割与多视图处理等核心视觉任务于7B参数单一架构，为视觉理解及GUI智能体开发提供高效基座。刚刚9.7K
articles.summary: SenseTime open-sourced SenseNova-Vision-7B-MoT, a 7B-parameter multi-task vision model integrating object detection, OCR, depth estimation, segmentation, and multi-view processing in a single architecture. The release provides an efficient open-source backbone for vision understanding and GUI agent development, advancing the open-model ecosystem in computer vision.

articles.title: Nvidia halves Asia buyer list in China chip crackdown
面壁智能CTO曾国洋：从“打字机”到大模型，端侧AI的进化与突围面壁智能另辟蹊径，专注端侧AI，将大模型压缩进手机、汽车等终端。28岁CTO曾国洋早年主导训练中国首个大语言模型CPM-1，如今致力推动轻量化智能落地移动设备。刚刚10.7K
articles.summary: MiniCPM maker Modelbest's 28-year-old CTO Zeng Guoyang, who led training of China's first large language model CPM-1, is now focused on compressing large models for edge devices such as phones and cars. This highlights the strategic importance of on-device AI as a competitive frontier distinct from cloud-based model scaling.

articles.title: 国产算力“出息了”，国内首个全国产十万卡集群落地
articles.summary: China has deployed its first fully domestically produced 100,000-GPU compute cluster, marking a significant engineering milestone in building sovereign AI infrastructure. However, the report notes that the commercial viability of such a cluster remains the real test, reflecting ongoing challenges in China's domestic AI chip ecosystem.

articles.title: Seed吃肉，Flow喝汤，当字节不再“All in”一个AI
articles.summary: A Tmtpost analysis reveals that within ByteDance's AI portfolio, the Seed research team and Flow product are diverging in resources and outcomes, with Doubao bearing the commercial burden of ByteDance's AI strategy. This internal resource allocation tension highlights the difficulty large tech companies face in balancing frontier AI research with product monetization.

articles.title: 4个月蒸发3400亿港元，创始人官宣“零薪酬”，MiniMax到底怎么了？
articles.summary: Chinese AI startup MiniMax has seen its stock price fall roughly 80%, erasing approximately HK$340 billion in market cap over four months, prompting its founder to announce a zero-salary pledge. The dramatic collapse raises concerns about overvaluation in Chinese AI stocks and the difficulty of monetizing frontier model capabilities.

articles.title: Silicon shadows: inside the black market for AI chips | FT Film
Silicon shadows: inside the black market for AI chips | FT Film
小米具身智能机器人“实习”新工站:双侧螺母上件成功率达98%小米机器人事业部公布汽车工厂实习新进展：自攻螺母上件双侧作业成功率升至98%，接近人工作业99%合格率，即将正式“转正”。同时，机器人拓展至总装车间物流区，新增中控台侧盖板排序和料箱折叠回收工站，均已投入稳定运行。刚刚7.4K
articles.summary: Xiaomi's humanoid robot division reported that its robots achieved a 98% success rate in dual-sided nut installation at an automotive factory, nearly matching the 99% human benchmark, and expanded to two additional workstations. This demonstrates rapid progress in deploying humanoid robots for real-world industrial tasks, intensifying competition in the robotics sector.

articles.title: 视频生成初创公司PixVerse完成4.39亿美元C轮融资，估值突破20亿美元新加坡视频生成初创公司PixVerse宣布完成4.39亿美元C轮融资，估值超20亿美元。阿里巴巴、Lollapalooza Capital、华侨银行旗下Lion X Ventures等参投。此前3月已由鼎晖投资领投首期C轮。资金将用于全球模型服务、团队扩招及企业业务全球化布局。刚刚7.7K
articles.summary: Singapore-based AI video generation startup PixVerse announced a $439 million Series C extension round valuing the company at over $2 billion, with Alibaba, Lollapalooza Capital, and Lion X Ventures among investors. The funding will accelerate global model deployment, team expansion, and enterprise business internationalization in the competitive AI video market.

articles.title: 36氪首发 | 前博世自动驾驶算法工程师创业，用合成数据做触觉大模型
articles.summary: Chinese spatial intelligence startup Dayantech, founded by a former Bosch autonomous driving algorithm engineer, is building a tactile large model using synthetic data and haptic gloves. The approach addresses the critical data scarcity problem in robotic touch sensing, which is essential for dexterous manipulation in next-generation robots.

articles.title: 人形机器人公司逐际动力完成2亿美元Pre-IPO轮融资，投后估值达150亿元｜最前线
articles.summary: Chinese humanoid robot company LimX Dynamics completed a nearly $200 million Pre-IPO funding round at a post-money valuation of 15 billion yuan (~$2.1B), backed by IDG Capital, Lansi Technology, and Middle Eastern investor Stone Venture, among others. The raise brings LimX's cumulative funding over the past six months to $400 million, reflecting surging investor confidence in humanoid robotics ahead of a potential IPO.

articles.title: 要价400亿的灵心巧手，估值比市场规模还大
articles.summary: Chinese dexterous hand robotics company Lingheart is reportedly seeking a valuation of 40 billion yuan (~$5.5B), which exceeds the current total market size of the sector it operates in. The report questions whether such valuations are sustainable, reflecting broader concerns about speculative excess in China's robotics investment boom.

articles.title: 智驾行业的2026上半年：兜底成为新门槛，淘汰赛加速
articles.summary: In H1 2026, China's autonomous driving industry shifted from free feature rollouts to paid liability-coverage tiers, redefining responsibility boundaries among automakers, suppliers, and users as market competition intensifies. This commercialization pivot is accelerating industry consolidation, with weaker players being squeezed out of the market.

articles.title: DeepSeek’s Liang Tops Amodei and Brockman as Richest AI Founder
articles.summary: DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng's net worth more than doubled following his firm's latest fundraising round, making him the world's wealthiest founder among AI model creators, surpassing Anthropic's Dario Amodei and OpenAI's Greg Brockman. This reflects the extraordinary valuation DeepSeek has achieved and signals China's growing prominence in the global foundation model race.

articles.title: China launches first 8-inch 2D chip line to bypass EUV limits
Intel challenges HBM leaders with XBM and ZAM in a bid to reshape AI memory
AI越会回答，人为什么越需要深度思考？复旦发布2026人文社科智能发展蓝皮书
articles.summary: Fudan University released its 2026 Blue Book on Intelligent Development in Humanities and Social Sciences, arguing that as AI becomes better at answering questions, humans need to cultivate deeper critical thinking skills. The report raises important questions about AI's impact on human cognition and the future of education and intellectual work.

articles.title: 紫光股份离“算力赢家”还有多远？
articles.summary: An analysis of Unigroup subsidiary Ziguang Shares examines how far the company is from becoming a genuine winner in China's AI compute infrastructure buildout, weighing compute demand tailwinds, integration synergies, and co-packaged optics (CPO) technology narratives. The piece reflects broader investor scrutiny of which hardware companies can actually capture value from China's AI infrastructure boom.

articles.title: AI支付没有激战，大厂也带不动？
articles.summary: Despite much fanfare, AI-powered payment systems have not gained significant traction in China, with even major tech giants struggling to drive adoption. The analysis suggests that AI payments face structural friction, raising questions about the near-term viability of AI as a payments interface layer.

articles.title: 6月进出口额增速均超预期 AI出口高增主要受涨价带动
articles.summary: China's June export and import growth both exceeded expectations, with AI-related exports posting high growth largely driven by price increases rather than volume. The finding suggests that China's AI export surge may partly reflect pricing power rather than purely expanded demand, complicating the narrative of AI trade dominance.

articles.title: 周期巅峰的长鑫上市：暴涨业绩能否撑起中国存储长期野心
articles.summary: Chinese memory chip maker CXMT (Changxin Memory Technologies) is approaching an IPO at the peak of its business cycle, posting surging revenues, amid questions about whether strong near-term results can sustain China's long-term ambitions in the memory chip sector. The listing is a key test of investor confidence in China's semiconductor self-sufficiency drive.

articles.title: 算力硬件进出口增超56%、空调等清凉家电出口超千亿元！重磅外贸数据公布
articles.summary: China's latest trade data showed computing hardware imports and exports grew over 56%, reflecting surging demand for AI infrastructure components both domestically and globally. The figures underscore how AI-driven compute demand is reshaping China's trade profile and boosting hardware-related manufacturing and exports.

articles.title: OpenAI’s Feud With xAI Carries On as Apple Secrets Fight Revs Up
articles.summary: OpenAI asked a court to dismiss xAI's trade secret theft lawsuit and sought over $1 million in legal fees from Elon Musk's company, escalating the legal battle between the two AI rivals. The ongoing litigation highlights deepening corporate warfare in the AI industry over talent, intellectual property, and competitive positioning.

articles.title: Rambus unveils DDR5 9600 chipset for next-generation AI servers
UMC pushes into silicon photonics in Singapore to ride AI's connectivity crunch
Intel concentrates its European chipmaking in Ireland with EUR5 billion Leixlip expansion
#5微软全面引入AI挖掘Windows漏洞，后续安全补丁修复数量将大幅增加
articles.summary: Microsoft has fully integrated AI into its process for discovering Windows vulnerabilities, which is expected to significantly increase the volume of security patches going forward. This marks a major shift in how AI is being used offensively and defensively in software security, with broad implications for the vulnerability disclosure ecosystem.

Tech Leaders Pledge Up to $500 Billion in AI Investment in U.S.
articles.summary: OpenAI, Oracle, and SoftBank announced plans at the White House to invest up to $500 billion in AI infrastructure within the United States. The pledge reflects both competitive pressure and a strategic alignment with US government priorities around domestic AI capacity.

Apple Is Suing OpenAI for Allegedly Stealing Hardware Secrets
articles.summary: Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging that OpenAI induced poached employees to bring confidential hardware presentations, prototypes, and supplier details. The case highlights intensifying competition for AI talent and raises serious trade-secret concerns at the intersection of hardware and AI development.

articles.title: Meta Launches New A.I. Model as Global Technology Race Heats Up
articles.summary: Meta has launched a new AI model and, for the first time, introduced a paid tier, departing from its longstanding open-access philosophy. This signals a strategic shift in Meta's AI monetization approach as competition in the global AI race intensifies.

articles.title: Meta’s Louisiana Data Center to Surpass $250 Billion Price Tag
articles.summary: Meta has committed an additional $40 billion to its Louisiana data center campus, pushing total expected investment beyond $250 billion for the site. The massive outlay reflects the escalating infrastructure arms race among Big Tech firms to support AI computing demands.

articles.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
articles.summary: China's DeepSeek claims to have trained high-performing AI models at low cost without relying on the most advanced chips. This challenges assumptions about the necessity of cutting-edge hardware for frontier AI and has significant implications for US chip export controls.

Washington Is Looking to Keep China From Training Its AI on US Models
articles.summary: Washington is exploring measures to prevent China from using US AI models as training data through a technique called 'adversarial distillation,' following warnings from Anthropic and OpenAI. The debate revives longstanding questions about AI export controls and intellectual property in the context of US-China tech competition.

articles.title: Nvidia Supplier SK Hynix Posts Record Profit on AI Boom
articles.summary: SK Hynix reported record quarterly and annual profits for 2024, fueled by surging demand for AI-related memory chips. The results underscore the pivotal role of high-bandwidth memory in the AI boom and the growing importance of non-US chip suppliers.

The future of chipmaking looks more like Manhattan than Silicon Valley
articles.summary: Physics constraints and geopolitical pressures are pushing chipmakers toward vertical, high-density architectures reminiscent of Manhattan skyscrapers rather than sprawling campuses. This structural shift in chip manufacturing has major implications for AI hardware capacity and supply chain resilience.

articles.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
articles.summary: Reid Hoffman and oncologist-author Siddhartha Mukherjee have raised $24.6 million to launch Manas AI, a startup focused on AI-driven cancer research. The venture signals growing investor confidence in applying AI to drug discovery and medical research.

articles.title: Apple's rumored M7 Ultra targets 1.5TB of memory and Blackwell-class AI performance, report claims — monster 2028 offering would depend on memory shortage easing
articles.summary: Apple's reportedly planned M7 Ultra chip is being designed to support up to 1.5 TB of unified memory and match Nvidia Blackwell-class AI performance, targeting a 2028 release. If realized, this would mark a significant leap in Apple's AI hardware ambitions and intensify competition in the high-performance chip market.

articles.title: SK Hynix says 2027 will be the 'worst year' for memory shortage, forecasts crunch to last until 2030 — CEO shares grim outlook on the day SK Hynix gets listed on Nasdaq
articles.summary: SK Hynix's CEO has warned that 2027 will be the worst year of the ongoing memory shortage, forecasting the crunch will persist until at least 2030. This outlook has serious implications for AI hardware availability and pricing, potentially constraining the pace of AI development industry-wide.

articles.title: 哈啰试水AI校园社交，推出精准交友产品“Match”7月13日，哈啰推出专为大学生打造的AI交友产品Match，已在上海高校试点月余，吸引超万人。用户需高校邮箱认证，填写三观性格问卷，平台通过AI算法深度匹配。后续将推出独立APP优化移动端体验。2  小时前11.6K

New York Times and Other Publishers Ask Court to Penalize OpenAI
articles.summary: The New York Times, New York Daily News, and other publishers have asked a court to penalize OpenAI for allegedly withholding evidence in an ongoing copyright lawsuit. The move escalates legal pressure on OpenAI over its use of copyrighted content and could set precedents for AI training data practices.

Quantum error correction can constantly recalibrate a processor
articles.summary: Researchers have demonstrated that reinforcement learning can use quantum error information to continuously recalibrate a quantum processor's control algorithms. This advance could accelerate the path to reliable quantum computing, which has significant long-term implications for AI workloads and cryptography.

articles.title: How to Prevent Meta From Using Your Instagram Images in A.I.
articles.summary: Meta's new AI image generator uses images from public Instagram accounts, raising privacy concerns and prompting guidance on how users can opt out. The development highlights ongoing tensions between AI training data practices and user consent.

articles.title: How to hide from killer drones
articles.summary: Combatants in the Ukraine war are developing unconventional camouflage techniques specifically designed to defeat AI-powered drone targeting systems. This illustrates how adversarial tactics are rapidly co-evolving with military AI applications, shaping the future of autonomous warfare.

In San Francisco, Some Home Sellers Now Ask for OpenAI or Anthropic Stock
articles.summary: Home sellers in the San Francisco Bay Area are increasingly requesting OpenAI and Anthropic stock as payment, reflecting how AI startup wealth is distorting local real estate markets even before IPOs. This trend underscores the enormous speculative value being assigned to leading AI companies.
